name: Specular Lighthouse Relay
description: Steer a live analytic reflected beam through three gimballed mirrors and sustain four ordered lighthouse receiver locks.
natural_language: Steer the lighthouse beam through every mirror and hold each receiver until all four shutters charge.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
